commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This replacement PR changes the chat delete confirmation popover to fixed viewport-clamped placement, adds edge-position geometry tests, and records the user-visible fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source-level reproduction path: current main anchors the popover absolutely above the delete button, and the source PR proof exercises the viewport-edge cases in Chromium. I did not rerun the browser path during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair PR is needed; the remaining path is normal exact-head checks and merge handling for this automerge replacement PR.

target.title: fix(ui): keep delete confirm in viewport
